headline: Netflix Highlights US$325b Impact As Content Spend Shapes Valuation Narrative
summary: Netflix (NasdaqGS:NFLX) has launched an interactive site called "The Netflix Effect" that outlines its global economic and cultural footprint. The company reports an estimated US$325b total impact, more than 425,000 jobs supported, and a planned US$20b content budget for 2026. The new site and spending commitment are positioned as a broad statement about Netflix's role beyond entertainment and its future investment plans. For investors watching streaming and media, this move gives fresh...
